report.summary: Second standup of Mar 29. All 6 agents completed first full rotation. BTC flat ~$66,000-66,200, ETH ~$1,995-2,024 (testing $2K). F&G 12-25 (sources diverge — streak may be breaking or persisting). 399 uncommitted files, Day 4+ stale. Cross-chain intents guide built, 2 pages promoted, 4 tweets drafted, 3 pages UX-audited. Deploy remains P0.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: ~$66,000–$66,200 (flat from last standup's $66,200-$66,700). Holding $66K support. Iran tensions + oil >$100 still primary headwinds. Whale accumulation continues at record pace — exchange reserves at 7-year lows.
ETH: ~$1,995–$2,024 (testing $2K psychological support, slight dip from last cycle's $2,024). ETH/BTC ratio ~0.030, still depressed. 24h volume $3.78B.

F&G INDEX: Sources diverge — feargreedmeter.com shows 10, SpotedCrypto had 14 on Mar 26, Blockchain Magazine 12 on Mar 28, but last standup reported 25. The 50+ day Extreme Fear streak is either persisting near record lows or showing early signs of breaking. Conservative read: still Extreme Fear (10-14), the 25 reading may have been a brief intraday spike.

DELTA FROM v1 STANDUP: BTC -$200 to -$500 (slight dip). ETH -$0 to -$30 (narrower range). F&G likely still 10-14 (revising down from v1's 25 — multiple sources confirm extreme fear persists). Uncommitted files 389→399 (+10). Published slugs stable at 602. Page.tsx count stable at 1,230.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: FULL ROTATION COMPLETED: All 6 agents ran since v1 standup — standup→publish→build→design→community→eod. This is the first complete cycle of Mar 29.

WHAT SHIPPED THIS ROTATION: (1) BUILD: Cross-chain intents & ERC-7683 learn guide (~3,000 words, 6 FAQs, JSON-LD). (2) PUBLISH: 2 pages promoted (Telegram mini-apps, onchain forex stablecoin guide). Total published: ~940 in published-pages.ts, 602 in PUBLISHED_PAGES set. (3) DESIGN: UX audit of 3 pages, OG image for cross-chain intents, BackToTop + mobile table fixes. (4) COMMUNITY: 4 tweets (#235-238), newsletter v39, SVG social card for Q1 divergence. (5) EOD/QA: 145 TS errors stable, 0 regressions, API routes healthy.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: (1) P0 CRITICAL — 399 uncommitted files, HEAD at 21aaf5b since Mar 25 (Day 4+ stale). (2) P1 — 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked (wallet-security slug mismatch, restaking missing page.tsx). (3) P2 — 105 legacy slugs missing page.tsx (~82% coverage). (4) P3 — 145 TS errors (non-blocking, stable). (5) P3 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk.
GIT STATUS: 399 files pending (+10 from v1). 31 files changed, 983 insertions, 595 deletions. All additive — no conflict risk.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [DAY 4+, EXISTENTIAL]: 399 uncommitted files. Every hour = lost indexing time for content built since Mar 25. The cross-chain intents guide, 12 new learn pages, UX fixes, OG images — all invisible to Google. Jefe action needed: `git add -A && git commit -m 'batch deploy' && git push`. 5-minute highest-leverage action.

PRIORITY 2 — CLEAR 2 BLOCKED QUEUE ITEMS: (a) Rename crypto-wallet-security-guide-2026 → crypto-wallet-security-token-approvals-guide to match slug. (b) Scaffold restaking-comparison page.tsx. Empties the queue, unblocks next publish cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — Q1 CLOSE CONTENT BLITZ: Tomorrow is Mar 30 — last trading day of Q1 2026. BTC -24.6% YTD, ETH -60%, worst Q1 since 2022. This is a massive content moment: 'Q1 2026 Crypto Retrospective', 'Worst Quarter Since FTX — What's Next', 'Fear Streak Record Analysis'. Community already has 4 tweets queued. Build cycle should produce a dedicated Q1 close analysis page.
